mapper.select: SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno) AS likecount, 1 AS liked FROM playlist p JOIN playlist_like pl ON p.playlistno = pl.playlistno WHERE pl.memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY p.rdate DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_like WHERE playlistno = #{playlistno}

SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno) AS likecount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_like pl WHERE pl.playlistno = p.playlistno AND pl.memberno = #{memberno}) AS liked FROM playlist p ORDER BY p.rdate DESC
